title: Contract B - OCR to Database
description: Data contract for OCR module extracting data from MERALCO bills. Owner: Web/OCR Team

scan_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the bill was scanned

meralco_account_number.description: MERALCO account number extracted from the bill

billing_period.description: Billing period as shown on the bill

total_kwh_consumed.description: Total kilowatt-hours consumed during the billing period

total_bill_php.description: Total bill amount in Philippine Pesos
